title: Sahifa Sajjadia Dua 44 for welcoming of the Month of Ramadhan

duas.title: Sahifa Sajjadia Dua 44 for welcoming of the Month of Ramadhan

segments.translation: Praise belongs to God who guided us to His praise

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلَنَا مِنْ أَهْلِهِ، لِنَكُونَ لِإِحْسَانِهِ مِنَ الشَّاكِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa jaa'lanaa min ah-lih linakoona liih'-saanihee minash-shaakireen
segments.translation: and placed us among the people of praise, that we might be among the thankful for His beneficence
and that He might recompense us for that with the recompense of the good-doers!
And praise belongs to God who showed favour to us through His religion,

segments.arabic: وَاخْتَصَّنَا بِمِلَّتِهِ، وَسَبَّلَنَا فِي سُبُلِ إحْسَانِهِ،
segments.transliteration: wakh-tas'-s'anaa bimil-latih wa sab-balanaa fee subuli ih'-saanih
segments.translation: singled us out for His creed, and directed us onto the roads of His beneficence,
in order that through His kindness we might travel upon them to His good pleasure,

segments.arabic: حَمْدَاً يَتَقَبَّلُهُ مِنَّا، وَيَرْضَى بِهِ عَنَّا.
segments.transliteration: h'am-day-yataqab-baluhoo min-naa wa yar-z''aa bihee a'n-naa
segments.translation: a praise which He will accept from us and through which He will be pleased with us!

segments.arabic: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّه الَّذِي جَعَلَ مِنْ تِلْكَ السُّبُلِ شَهْرَهُ شَهْرَ رَمَضَانَ،
segments.transliteration: wal-h'am-du lil-laahil-lad'ee jaa'la min til-kas-subuli shah-rah shah-ra ramaz''aan
segments.translation: And praise belongs to God who appointed among those roads His month, the month of Ramadan,

segments.arabic: شَهْرَ الصِّيَامِ، وَشَهْرَ الإِسْلاَم، وَشَهْرَ الطَّهُورِ،
segments.translation: the month of fasting, the month of submission, the month of purity,
the month of putting to test, the month of standing in prayer,

segments.arabic: الَّذِي أُنْزِلَ فِيْهِ الْقُرْآنُ هُدىً لِلنَّاسِ،
segments.translation: "in which the Qur'an was sent down as guidance to the people,
and as clear signs of the Guidance and the Separator" (2:185)!
He clarified its excellence over other months

segments.arabic: بِمَا جَعَلَ لَهُ مِنَ الْحُرُمَاتِ الْمَوْفُورَةِ وَالْفَضَائِلِ الْمَشْهُورَةِ،
segments.translation: by the many sacred things and well-known excellencies which He placed therein,

segments.arabic: فَحَرَّمَ فِيْهِ ما أَحَلَّ فِي غَيْرِهِ إعْظَاماً،
segments.transliteration: fah'ar-rama feehee maaa ah'al-la fee ghay-riheee ia'-z'aamaa
segments.translation: for He made unlawful in it what He declared lawful in others to magnify it,
He prohibited foods and drinks in it to honour it,

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلَ لَهُ وَقْتاً بَيِّناً لاَ يُجِيزُ جَلَّ وَعَزَّ أَنْ يُقَدَّمَ قَبْلَهُ،
segments.transliteration: wa jaa'la lahoo waq-taa bay-yinaa laa yujeezu jal-la wa a'z-za ay-yuqad-dama qab-lah
segments.translation: and He appointed for it a clear time which He (majestic and mighty is He) allows not to be set forward
and accepts not to be placed behind.

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ فَضَّلَ لَيْلَةً وَاحِدَةً مِنْ لَيَالِيهِ عَلَى لَيَالِي أَلْفِ شَهْر،
segments.transliteration: thum-ma faz''-z''ala lay-lataw-waah'idatam-mil-layaaleehee a'laa layaaleee al-fi shah-ri
segments.translation: Then He made one of its nights surpass the nights of a thousand months
and named it the Night of Decree;

segments.arabic: تَنَزَّلُ الْمَلائِكَةُ وَالرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإذْنِ رَبِّهِمْ مِنْ كُلِّ أَمْر،
segments.transliteration: (tanaz-zalul-malaaa-ikatu war-roohoo feehaa biid'-ni rab-bhim min kul-li am-rin)
segments.translation: "in it the angels and the Spirit descend by the leave of their Lord upon every command,

segments.arabic: سَلاَمٌ دَائِمُ الْبَرَكَةِ إلَى طُلُوعِ الْفَجْرِ،
segments.translation: a peace" (97:4-5) constant in blessings until the rising of the dawn

segments.arabic: عَلَى مَنْ يَشَاءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ بِمَا أَحْكَمَ مِنْ قَضَائِهِ.
segments.transliteration: a'laa may-yashaaa-u min i'baadihee bimaaa ah'-kama min qaz''aaa-ih
segments.translation: upon whomsoever He will of His servants according to the decision He has made firm.
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.transliteration: wa al-him-naa maa'-rifata faz''-lih wa ij-laala h'ur-matih
segments.translation: inspire us with knowledge of its excellence, veneration of its inviolability,
and caution against what You hast forbidden within it,

segments.arabic: وَأَعِنَّـا عَلَى صِيَامِـهِ بِكَفِّ الْجَـوَارِحِ عَنْ مَعَاصِيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa ai'n-naa a'laa s'eeaamihee bikaf-fil-jawaarihee a'm-maa'as'eeka
segments.translation: and help us to fast in it by our restraining our limbs from acts of disobedience toward You
and our employing them in that which pleases You,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى لاَ نُصْغِىَ بِأَسْمَاعِنَا إلَى لَغْو،
segments.transliteration: h'at-taa laa nus'-gheea bi s-maai'naaa ilaa lagh-w
segments.translation: so that we lend not our ears to idle talk

segments.transliteration: wa laa nus-ria' bi b-s'aarinaaa ilaa lah-w
segments.translation: and hurry not with our eyes to diversion,

segments.arabic: وَحَتَّى لاَ نَبْسُطَ أَيْدِيَنَا إلَى مَحْظُور،
segments.transliteration: wa h'at-taa laa nab-sut'a ay-deeanaaa ilaa mah'-z'oor
segments.translation: we stretch not our hands toward the forbidden

segments.transliteration: wa laa nakh-t'oo bi q-daaminaaa ilaa mah'-joor
segments.translation: and stride not with our feet toward the prohibited,

segments.arabic: وَحَتَّى لاَ تَعِيَ بُطُونُنَا إلاَّ مَا أَحْلَلْتَ،
segments.transliteration: wa h'at-taa laa tae'ea but'oonunaaa il-laa maaa ah'-lal-t
segments.translation: our bellies hold only what You hast made lawful

segments.arabic: وَلا تَنْطِقَ أَلْسِنَتُنَا إلاَّ بِمَا مَثَّلْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa laa tant'iqa al-sinatunaaa il-laa bimaa math-thal-t
segments.translation: and our tongues speak only what You hast exemplified,

segments.arabic: وَلا نَتَكَلَّفَ إلاَّ ما يُدْنِي مِنْ ثَوَابِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa laa natakal-lafa il-laa maa yud-nee min thawaabik
segments.translation: we undertake nothing but what brings close to Your reward

segments.arabic: وَلاَ نَتَعَاطَى إلاّ الَّذِي يَقِيْ مِنْ عِقَابِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa laa nataa'at'aaa il-laal-lad'ee yaqee min i'qaabik
segments.translation: and pursue nothing but what protects from Your punishment!

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ خَلِّصْ ذَلِكَ كُلَّهُ مِنْ رِئآءِ الْمُرَائِينَ وَسُمْعَةِ الْمُسْمِعِينَ،
segments.transliteration: thum-ma khal-lis' d'alika kul-lahoo min reeaaa-il-muraaa-een wa sum-a'til-mus-mie'en
segments.translation: Then rid all of that from the false show of the false showers and the fame seeking of the fame seekers,
lest we associate therein anything with You

segments.transliteration: wa laa nab-taghee bihee muraadana siwaak
segments.translation: or seek therein any object of desire but You!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
in it make us attend to the appointed moments
of the five prayers within the bounds You hast set,

segments.arabic: وَفُرُوضِهَا الَّتِي فَرَضْتَ وَوَظَائِفِهَا الَّتِي وَظَّفْتَ،
segments.transliteration: wa furooz''ihaal-latee faraz''-t wa waz'aaa-ifihaal-latee waz'-z'af-t
segments.translation: the obligations You hast decreed, the duties You hast assigned,
and the times You hast specified;

segments.transliteration: wa anzil-naa feehaa manzilata al-mus'eebeena limanaazilihaa
segments.translation: and in the prayers make us alight in the station of the keepers of their stations,
the guardians of their pillars, their performers in their times,

segments.arabic: فِي أَوْقَاتِهَـا عَلَى مَا سَنَّـهُ عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُـولُكَ صَلَوَاتُـكَ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِـهِ
segments.transliteration: feee aw-qaatihaa a'laa maa san-nahoo a'b-duka wa rasooluka s'alawaatuka a'lay-hee wa aaalihee
segments.translation: as Your servant and Your messenger set down in his Sunna (Your blessings be upon him and his Household)

segments.transliteration: fee rukooi'haa wasujoodihaa wa jameei' fawaaz''ilihaa
segments.translation: in their bowings, their prostrations, and all their excellent acts,

segments.arabic: عَلى أَتَمِّ الطَّهُورِ، وَأَسْبَغِهِ وَأَبْيَنِ الْخُشُوعِ وَأَبْلَغِهِ،
segments.transliteration: a'laa atam-mit'-t'ahoori wa as-baghih wa ab-yanil-khushooi' wa ab-laghih
segments.translation: with the most complete and ample ritual purity and the most evident and intense humility!

segments.arabic: وَوَفِّقْنَا فِيهِ لاِنْ نَصِلَ أَرْحَامَنَا بِالبِرِّ وَالصِّلَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa waf-fiq-naa feeh lian-nas'ila ar-h'aamanaa bil-bir-ri was'-s'ilah
segments.translation: Give us success in this month to tighten our bonds of kin with devotion and gifts,
attend to our neighbours with bestowal and giving,
rid our possessions from claims,
purify them through paying the alms,
go back to him who has gone far from us,
treat justly him who has wronged us,
make peace with him who shows enmity toward us

segments.transliteration: h'aashaa man u'wdeea feeka wa laka
segments.translation: (except him who is regarded as an enemy in You and for You,
for he is the enemy whom we will not befriend,
the party whom we will not hold dear),

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ نَتَقَرَّبَ إلَيْكَ فِيْهِ مِنَ الأَعْمَالِ الزَّاكِيَةِ بِمَا تُطَهِّرُنا بِهِ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ،
segments.transliteration: wa an-nataqar-raba ilay-ka feehee minal-aa'-maaliz-zaakeeati bimaa tut'ah-hirunaa bihee minad'-d'unoob
segments.translation: and seek nearness to You through blameless works which will purify us from sins

segments.arabic: وَتَعْصِمُنَا فِيهِ مِمَّا نَسْتَأنِفُ مِنَ الْعُيُوبِ،
segments.transliteration: wa taa'-s'imunaa feehee mim-maa nas-taa-nifu minal-u'yoob
segments.translation: and preserve us from renewing faults,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى لا يُورِدَ عَلَيْكَ أَحَدٌ مِنْ مَلاَئِكَتِكَ
segments.translation: so that none of Your angels will bring for You

segments.arabic: إلاّ دُونَ مَا نُورِدُ مِنْ أَبْوابِ الطَّاعَةِ لَكَ، وَأَنْوَاعِ القُرْبَةِ إلَيْكَ.
segments.transliteration: il-laa doona maa nooridu min ab-waabit'-t'aaa'ti laka wa anwaai'l-qur-bati ilay-k
segments.translation: the kinds of obedience and sorts of nearness-seeking unless they be less than what we bring!

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ إنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّ هَذَا الشَّهْرِ،
segments.translation: O God, I ask You by the right of this month

segments.transliteration: wa bih'aq-qi man taa'b-bada laka feehee
segments.translation: and by the right of him who worships You within it
from its beginning to the time of its passing,

segments.arabic: مِنْ مَلَك قَرَّبْتَهُ أَوْ نَبِيٍّ أَرْسَلْتَهُ
segments.translation: whether angel You hast brought nigh to You, prophet You hast sent,
or righteous servant You hast singled out,
that You bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَأَهِّلْنَا فِيهِ لِمَا وَعَدْتَ أَوْلِياءَكَ مِنْ كَرَامَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa ah-hil-naa feehee limaa waa't-ta aw-leeaaa-aka min karaamatik
segments.translation: make us worthy of the generosity You hast promised Your friends,

segments.arabic: وَأَوْجِبْ لَنَا فِيهِ مَا أَوْجَبْتَ لأِهْلِ الْمُبَالَغَةِ فِي طَاعَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa aw-jib lanaa feehee maaa aw-jab-ta liah-lil-mubaalaghati fee t'aaa'tik
segments.translation: make incumbent for us what You hast made incumbent for those who go to great lengths in obeying You,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْنَا فِي نَظْمِ مَنِ اسْتَحَقَّ الرَّفِيْعَ الأعْلَى بِرَحْمَتِكَ.
segments.transliteration: waj-a'l-naa fee naz'-mi mani as-tah'aq-qar-rafeea'l-aa'-laa birah'-matik
segments.translation: and place us in the ranks of those who deserve through Your mercy the highest elevation!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَجَنِّبْنَا الإلْحَادَ فِي تَوْحِيدِكَ وَالتَّقْصِيرَ فِي تَمْجِيدِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa jan-nib-naa al-il-h'aada fee taw-h'eedik wat-taq-s'eera fee tam-jeedik
segments.translation: turn us aside from deviation in professing Your Unity, falling short in magnifying You,

segments.arabic: وَالشَّكَّ فِي دِينِـكَ وَالْعَمَى عَنْ سَبِيْلِكَ وَالاغْفَالَ لِحُرْمَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wash-shak-ka fee deenik wal-a'maa a'n sabeelik wal-igh-faala lih'ur-matik
segments.translation: uncertainty in Your religion, blindness toward Your path, heedlessness of Your inviolability,
and being deceived by Your enemy, the accursed Satan!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَإذَا كَانَ لَكَ فِيْ كُلِّ لَيْلَة مِنْ لَيَالِيْ شَهْرِنَا هَذَا
segments.transliteration: wa id'aa kaana laka fee kul-li lay-latim-mil-layaalee shah-rinaa had'aa
segments.translation: and when in every night of this month's nights

segments.arabic: رِقَابٌ يُعْتِقُهَا عَفْوُكَ أَوْ يَهَبُهَا صَفْحُكَ
segments.translation: You hast necks which Your pardon will release and Your forgiveness disregard,
place our necks among those necks

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْنَا لِشَهْرِنَا مِنْ خَيْرِ أَهْل وَأَصْحَاب.
segments.transliteration: waj-a'l-naa lishah-rinaa min khay-ri ah-liw-wa as'-h'aab
segments.translation: and place us among the best folk and companions of this our month!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,
efface our sins along with the effacing of its crescent moon,

segments.arabic: وَاسْلَخْ عَنَّا تَبِعَاتِنَا مَعَ انْسِلاَخِ أَيَّامِهِ
segments.transliteration: was-lakh a'n-naa tabia'atinaa maa' ansilaakhi ay-yaamih
segments.translation: and make us pass forth from the ill effects of our acts with the passing of its days,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى يَنْقَضِي عَنَّا وَقَدْ صَفَّيْتَنَا فِيهِ مِنَ الْخَطِيئاتِ
segments.transliteration: h'at-taa yanqaz''eea a'n-naa waqad- s'af-fay-tanaa feehee minal-khat'ee-aat
segments.translation: until it leaves us behind, while within it You hast purified us of offenses
and rid us of evil deeds!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَإنْ مِلْنَا فِيهِ فَعَدِّلْنا، وَإنْ زِغْنَا فِيهِ فَقَوِّمْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa im-mil-naa feehee faa'd-dil-naa wa in zugh-naa feehee faqaw-wim-naa
segments.translation: and should we go off to one side in this month, set us aright; should we swerve, point us straight;

segments.arabic: وَإنِ اشْتَمَلَ عَلَيْنَا عَدُوُّكَ الشَّيْطَانُ فَاسْتَنْقِذْنَا مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ini ash-tamala a'lay-naa a'doo-wukash-shay-t'aanu fas-tanqid'-naa min-h
segments.translation: and should Your enemy Satan enwrap us, rescue us from him!
O God, fill this month with our worship of You,
adorn its times with our obedience toward You,

segments.transliteration: wa ai'n-naa fee nahaarihee a'laa s'eeaamih
segments.translation: help us during its daytime with its fast,
and in its night with prayer
and pleading toward You, humility toward You,
and lowliness before You,

segments.arabic: حَتَّى لا يَشْهَدَ نَهَارُهُ عَلَيْنَا بِغَفْلَة، وَلا لَيْلُهُ بِتَفْرِيط.
segments.transliteration: h'at-taa laa yash-hada nahaaruhoo a'lay-naa bighaf-latiw-wa laa lay-luhoo bitaf-reet'
segments.translation: so that its daytime may not bear witness against our heedlessness, nor its night against our neglect!

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ وَاجْعَلْنَا فِي سَائِرِ الشُّهُورِ وَالأَيَّامِ كَذَلِكَ مَا عَمَّرْتَنَا،
segments.transliteration: al-laahum-ma waj-a'l-naa fee saaa-irish-shuhoori wal-ay-yaami kad'alika maa a'm-mar-tanaa
segments.translation: O God, make us like this in the other months and days as long as You givest us life,
and place us among Your righteous servants,

segments.arabic: الَّذِينَ يَرِثُونَ الْفِرْدَوْسَ، هُمْ فِيهَا خَالِدُونَ،
segments.translation: "those who shall inherit Paradise, therein dwelling forever" (23:11),
"those who give what they give, while their hearts quake,
that they are returning to their Lord" (23:60),

segments.arabic: وَمِنَ الَّذِينَ يُسَارِعُونَ فِي الْخَيْرَاتِ وَهُمْ لَهَا سَابِقُونَ.
segments.transliteration: wa minal-lad'eena (yusaariu'wna fil-khay-raati wahum lahaa saabiqoon)
segments.translation: those who "..vie in good works, outracing to them" (23:61)!
O God, bless Muhammad and his Household

segments.arabic: فِي كُلِّ وَقْت وَكُلِّ أَوَان وَعَلَى كُـلِّ حَال
segments.transliteration: fee kul-li waq-t wakul-li awaan wa a'laa kul-li h'aal
segments.translation: in every time, in all moments, and in every state,

segments.arabic: عَـدَدَ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى مَنْ صَلَّيْتَ عَلَيْهِ،
segments.transliteration: a'dada maa s'al-lay-ta a'laa man s'al-lay-ta a'lay-h
segments.translation: to the number that You hast blessed whomsoever You hast blessed
and to multiples of all that, through multiples
which none can count but You!
Surely You art Accomplisher of what You desirest.

_index_meta.title: Sahifa Sajjadia Dua 44 for welcoming of the Month of Ramadhan
